models_evaluated.name: GPT-4o
models_evaluated.recommendation: PRIMARY — Best instruction following for structured legal output

models_evaluated.name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
models_evaluated.recommendation: LONG CONTEXT — Use for full contract review (1M token window)

models_evaluated.name: DeepSeek-V3
models_evaluated.recommendation: COST-EFFICIENT — 20x cheaper; use for batch summarization tasks

models_evaluated.name: Mistral-Large
models_evaluated.recommendation: BACKUP — Competitive quality; EU data residency option

decision_matrix.task_primary_qa: GPT-4o — highest F1 on LegalBench contract interpretation
decision_matrix.task_long_contract_review: Gemini 1.5 Pro — 1M context window handles full contracts
decision_matrix.task_batch_summarization: DeepSeek-V3 — 20x cost reduction acceptable for non-interactive
decision_matrix.task_eu_deployment: Mistral-Large — EU infrastructure, strong GDPR compliance story

final_recommendation: GPT-4o as primary for interactive Q&A (best LegalBench F1=0.84). Gemini 1.5 Pro for full contract ingestion (1M context). DeepSeek-V3 for high-volume batch tasks (cost $0.27/1M tokens).
